etymology: Fergesson = son of Fergus (man of vigor)
wordplay_note: A vigorous man whose vigor fails him
card_description: Jim Fergesson (meaning "Fergesson = son of Fergus (man of vigor)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *In Milton Lumky Territory*. Small-town businessman whose marriage and enterprise slowly collapse. Name note: A vigorous man whose vigor fails him. The small businessman — PKD's recurring tragic hero of American commerce. First appears in *In Milton Lumky Territory*.

reference.brief: Small-town businessman whose marriage and enterprise slowly collapse
reference.etymology: Fergesson = son of Fergus (man of vigor)
reference.significance: The small businessman — PKD's recurring tragic hero of American commerce
